mapper.sql: SELECT r.product_review_id, r.review_content, r.review_date, r.review_rate, r.writer_id, r.review_title, r.images, u.nickname FROM tbl_product_review r LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_user u ON r.writer_id = u.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbl_product_review ( product_review_id, product_id, writer_id, review_content, review_date, review_rate, review_title, images ) VALUES ( product_review_seq.nextval, #{product_id}, #{writer_id}, #{review_content, jdbcType=CLOB}, sysdate, #{review_rate}, #{review_title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{images, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
